title: Copyable Discs and Sherds
body:
![Craft Duplicates of Your Discs and Sherds!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/258214671d93a0e51bde4ffb7e81851bbdc5678a.png)

# **IMPORTANT** - I (AverageTaTeMan) only share my content on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/averagetateman/), [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/user/AverageTaTeMan), and [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/averagetateman/projects) - If you see this project on any other site, IT IS NOT ME AND SHOULD NOT BE TRUSTED!

This data pack provides a way to craft more Music Discs and Pottery Sherds you may want. It will require having one of the desired disc/sherd, an extra disc/sherd you want to be overwritten, and some extra materials (see example pictures). This will grant you an additonal copy of the desired disk/sherd. Good for turning those extra useless discs/sherds you don't care for into your favorite ones instead!

Recipes generated with help from TheDestruc7i0n's Crafting Generator: [Check it Out!](https://crafting.thedestruc7i0n.ca/)

![Example Disc Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e299d802a0571888b615ebab94dbc51aa6bd30e.webp)

![Example Sherd Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60f7b1bd2a99f35df961b2317e00b22525637515.webp)
